title: Designing in code
speakers: Elle Shwer (Product Manager, Figma), Iris Lin (Product Designer, Figma), Nikolas Klein (Product Manager, Figma), Ben Chen (Engineering Manager, Figma)
key_points: Introduces two new Figma launches aimed at closing the gap between designing and working in code, bringing code natively into Figma.
Make lets designers work directly in their local codebase to design in code.
Code layers let users explore and work with code right on the Figma canvas.
Positions code as part of the full workflow, supporting iterating, prototyping, and collaborating in code all the way to production.
